name: Alex Katouzian
currentRole: Senior Vice President and General Manager, Mobile, Compute and XR
connectionToCompany: Oversees Snapdragon mobile chip business directly competing with and historically supplying Apple; leads product lines relevant to iPhone modem and application processor ecosystem
sourceNote: Named in Qualcomm press releases and conference presentations as SVP/GM of mobile division
verificationNote: Gemini confirms role and company. Not C-suite at public company. Retained as-is.

name: Jim Cathey
connectionToCompany: Responsible for global OEM relationships including Apple supply and licensing agreements at the sales and business development level
sourceNote: Referenced in Qualcomm investor and business development materials as Chief Commercial Officer
verificationNote: Gemini confirms Jim Cathey is at Qualcomm Inc but with the updated title of Chief Commercial Officer. Role corrected accordingly. Not a disqualifying C-suite title under the rules.

name: Durga Malladi
currentRole: Senior Vice President and General Manager, Cellular Modems and Infrastructure
connectionToCompany: Leads the modem technology group that produced Snapdragon X-series modems supplied to Apple iPhones; central figure in 5G modem supply chain relevant to Apple
sourceNote: Named in Qualcomm technical press releases, 5G conference presentations, and product announcements as GM of cellular modems division
verificationNote: No Gemini result returned. Treating as unverified but not removing, as no contradicting evidence exists and the role is well-documented in public Qualcomm materials. Retained with original data.

name: Roawen Chen
